prompt: Keep the woman's face, hair, skin tone, body and her fine NAVY-AND-WHITE PINSTRIPE cotton midi dress unchanged and photoreal — do not change her identity or the dress pattern or color. You MAY redraw her lower legs and feet ONLY as needed so they land naturally on steps. She is mid-stride descending a short flight of pale stone steps. Give her REAL steps that MATCH her stride: her FRONT (lower) foot planted flat and fully on a lower step tread, her BACK foot planted on the step above it. BOTH black flat shoes are FULLY VISIBLE and naturally aligned on the step treads — NOT tucked behind the skirt, NOT hidden, NOT floating, NOT perched on a single edge. A soft realistic contact shadow sits where each shoe meets its step. Background: a bright white Cycladic plaster wall with gentle lived-in limewash texture and a faint warm patina low near the ground, and a weathered pale-blue wooden shutter set HIGH in the upper-right, clearly above and clear of her head. A terracotta pot of lavender rests naturally on the steps at the base of the wall — the lavender grows FROM the pot, not from a crack. Soft warm Mediterranean daylight. Photographic, editorial, medium-format film look, fine grain, muted natural color — a real photograph, never illustration or CGI. Vertical 2:3.
